Part.Source:
Event Insertar.Before if &Buscar_ZonaNombre.IsEmpty() &RestCode = 412 return endif Endevent
Event Buscar.Before if &Buscar_ZonaId <= 0 &RestCode = 412 return endif Endevent
Event Modificar.Before if &Buscar_ZonaId <= 0 &RestCode = 412 return endif Endevent
Event Borrar.Before if &Buscar_ZonaId <= 0 &RestCode = 412 return endif Endevent
parm(in:&ZonaNombre, out:&Messages);

///////////////////////////// // Modificar Concepto de Caja
&Zona.Load(&ZonaCodigo) &Zona.ZonaNombre = &ZonaNombre If &Zona.Update() Commit Else Rollback Endif // Devuelve mensajes &Messages = &Zona.GetMessages()

///////////////////////////// // Borrar Concepto de Caja
&Zona.Load(&ZonaCodigo) &Zona.Delete() If &Zona.Success() Commit Else Rollback Endif // Devuelve mensajes &Messages = &Zona.GetMessages()
parm(in:&ZonaCodigo, out:&Messages);
parm(&ZonaId);

Object.name: ZonaLista_DP
Object.description: Recuperar Lista de Conceptos de Caja

Part.Source: parm(&ZonaNombre);

Property.Name: Description
Property.Value: Recuperar Lista de Conceptos de Caja

Object.name: GeneXus
Object.author: GeneXus
Object.moduleDescription: GeneXus Core Module is a basic set of interfaces and implementations of data structures and algorithms to solve common programming use cases.

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Minimum precision required to obtain the location, in meters

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Maximum time to wait in seconds, to obtain the desired accuracy

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Indicates if it is necessary to include the heading and speed information

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: If set to true, following actions in a composite block will be executed, regardless of the execution status of this method

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Returns the current location for the device

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Minimum precision required to obtain the location, in meters

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Maximum time to wait in seconds, to obtain the desired accuracy

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Indicates if it is necessary to include the heading and speed information

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Same as GetMyLocation(int, int, bool, bool), passing false to the last parameter

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Indicates wether the application has been given permission to use location services

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Indicates wether location services are enable in the device

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Minimum time in seconds to generate new tracking information

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Minimum distance in meters to generate new tracking information

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: The name of the action from the parent object to be called where there is new tracking information available

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: The minimum interval in seconds between invocations to the action. Must be greater than changesInterval.

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Minimum time in seconds to generate new tracking information

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Minimum distance in meters to generate new tracking information

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: The name of the action from the parent object to be called where there is new tracking information available

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: The minimum interval in seconds between invocations to the action. Must be greater than changesInterval.

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Precision to obtain the locations, in meters

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Stops the generation of tracking information

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Returns a collection of location information generated by the tracking methods

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Removes all previous location information generated by the tracking methods

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Returns the latitude of the given location

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Returns the longitude of the given location

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Returns the distance between the two locations given

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Returns a collection of addresses for the given location

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Returns a collection of locations for the given address

Part.Source: parm(in:&DirectionsRequestParameters, out:&Routes, out:&errorMessages);

Item.name: name
Item.description: The expected travel time in seconds

Property.Name: Description
Property.Value: The expected travel time in seconds

Item.name: advisoryNotices
Item.description: A collection of advisory notice strings for the route

Property.Name: Description
Property.Value: A collection of advisory notice strings for the route

Item.name: expectedTravelTime
Item.description: The expected travel time in seconds

Property.Name: Description
Property.Value: The expected travel time in seconds

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Makes a target visible. For example, ShowTarget("Left") opens the Drawer in an app with Slide Navigation.

Property.Name: IDEnumDefinedValues
Property.Value: 1, Exists, Exists; 2, NotExists, Not Exists; 3, Equal, Equal; 4, NotEqual, Not Equal; 5, Greater, Greater; 6, Less, Less

Property.Name: IDEnumDefinedValues
Property.Value: 1, Everybody, Everybody; 2, Devices, Devices; 3, Groups, Groups; 4, Targets, Targets

Property.Name: IDEnumDefinedValues
Property.Value: 1, None, None; 2, SetTo, Set To; 3, Increase, Increase

Part.Source: parm(in:&Configuration, in:&DeviceToken, in:&Groups, out:&Messages, out:&Success);
parm(in:&Configuration, in:&DeviceToken, in:&FilterName, in:&FilterValue, out:&Messages, out:&Success);
parm(in:&Configuration, in:&DeviceToken, in:&FilterName, in:&FilterValue, out:&OutMessages, out:&Success);
parm(in:&Configuration, in:&DeviceToken, in:&Groups, out:&Messages, out:&Success);
parm(in:&Configuration, in:&DeviceToken, in:&NotificationMessage, in:&Delivery, out:&Messages, out:&Success);
parm(in:&Configuration, in:&DeviceToken, in:&NotificationEvent, in:&Delivery, out:&Messages, out:&Success);
parm(in:&Configuration, in:&Target, in:&NotificationMessage, in:&Delivery, out:&Messages, out:&Success);
parm(in:&Configuration, in:&Target, in:&Event, in:&Delivery, out:&Messages, out:&Success);
parm(in:&Configuration, in:&DeviceToken, in:&FilterTags, out:&Messages, out:&Success);

LevelInfo.name: Sound
LevelInfo.description: Sound (default Notification sound will be played)

Property.Name: Description
Property.Value: Sound (default Notification sound will be played)

Item.name: Channel
Item.description: The Android Oreo Notification Category to send the notification under

Property.Name: Description
Property.Value: The Android Oreo Notification Category to send the notification under

Item.name: BackCompatibility
Item.description: Enable only if you want to keep compatibility with older GeneXus SD Devices

Property.Name: Description
Property.Value: Enable only if you want to keep compatibility with older GeneXus SD Devices

Property.Name: IDEnumDefinedValues
Property.Value: AMAZONS3, Amazon_S3, Amazon S3; BOX, Box, Box Cloud Storage; GOOGLE, Google_CloudStorage, Google Cloud Storage; BLUEMIXSTORAGE, IBM_Bluemix, IBM Bluemix Storage (deprecated); IBMCOS, IBM_ObjectStorage, IBM Cloud Object Storage; AZURESTORAGE, Microsoft_Azure, MIcrosoft Azure Storage; OPENSTACKSTORAGE, OpenStack, Open Stack

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Instances a StorageProvider data type for a specific provider with a set of properties

Property.Name: IDEnumDefinedValues
Property.Value: 1, Server, Server; 2, Device, Device; 3, Browser, Browser

Property.Name: IDEnumDefinedValues
Property.Value: 1, Standard, Standard; 2, Satellite, Satellite; 3, Hybrid, Hybrid

Property.Name: IDEnumDefinedValues
Property.Value: 0, OFF, OFF; 5, DEBUG, DEBUG; 10, INFO, INFO; 15, WARNING, WARNING; 20, ERROR, ERROR; 30, FATAL, FATAL

Property.Name: IDEnumDefinedValues
Property.Value: GXM_Any, Any, Any; GXM_Driving, Driving, Driving; GXM_Walking, Walking, Walking; GXM_Transit, Transit, Transit; GXM_Bicycling, Bicycling, Bicycling

Property.Name: IDEnumDefinedValues
Property.Value: 0, Unspecified, Unspecified; 1, Light, Light; 2, Dark, Dark

Property.Name: IDEnumDefinedValues
Property.Value: entereffect, EnterEffect, Enter Effect; exiteffect, ExitEffect, Exit Effect; target, Target, Target; targetheight, TargetHeight, Target Height; targetsize, TargetSize, Target Size; targetwidth, TargetWidth, Target Width; type, Type, Type

Property.Name: IDEnumDefinedValues
Property.Value: 0, Unknown, Unknown; 1, Reduced, Reduced; 2, Full, Full

Property.Name: IDEnumDefinedValues
Property.Value: 0, Default, Default; -1, Best, Best; -2, BestForNavigation, BestForNavigation; -3, NearestTenMeters, Nearest Ten Meters; -4, HundredMeters, HundredMeters; -5, Kilometer, Kilometer; -6, ThreeKilometer, Three Kilometer; -7, Reduced, Reduced

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Returns the value of the environment variable. If it doesn't exist, it returns null.

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Returns TRUE if the environment variable exists.

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Retrieves all environment variable names and their values from the current process.

Object.name: Log
Object.description: Allow to Log application events to the selected target log in the environment properties

Property.Name: Description
Property.Value: Allow to Log application events to the selected target log in the environment properties

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Indicates whether the application has been given permission to use location services

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Indicates whether location services are enable in the device

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Indicates the level of location accuracy the user has granted permission to use

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: The source location for the route

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: The destination location for the route

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Calculates directions between the source and destination locations

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: The source location for the route

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: The destination location for the route

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: The transport type to use when calculating the route

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Whether the service will serve multiple alternative routes

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Calculates directions between the source and destination locations with additional parameters

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Calculates directions between the source and destination locations with additional parameters

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Minimum precision required to obtain the location, in meters

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Maximum time to wait in seconds, to obtain the desired accuracy

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Indicates if it is necessary to include the heading and speed information

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Same as GetLocation(int, int, bool, bool), passing false to the last parameter

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Minimum precision required to obtain the location, in meters

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Maximum time to wait in seconds, to obtain the desired accuracy

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Indicates if it is necessary to include the heading and speed information

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: If set to true, following actions in a composite block will be executed, regardless of the execution status of this method

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Returns the current location for the device

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Minimum time in seconds to generate new tracking information

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Minimum distance in meters to generate new tracking information

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: The name of the action from the parent object to be called where there is new tracking information available

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: The minimum interval in seconds between invocations to the action. Must be greater than changesInterval.

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Minimum time in seconds to generate new tracking information

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Minimum distance in meters to generate new tracking information

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: The name of the action from the parent object to be called where there is new tracking information available

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: The minimum interval in seconds between invocations to the action. Must be greater than changesInterval.

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Precision to obtain the locations, in meters

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Stops the generation of tracking information

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Returns a collection of location information generated by the tracking methods

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Removes all previous location information generated by the tracking methods

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Returns the latitude of the given location

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Returns the longitude of the given location

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Returns a collection of addresses for the given location

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Returns a collection of locations for the given address

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Returns the distance between the two locations given

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: The purpose for using full accuracy. This value could be showed to the user by the OS.

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Requests the user’s permission to temporarily use location services with full accuracy

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Sets the given CallOption's value to the given object name

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Invoke the contructor of the object

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Sets the given CallOption's value to the given object name

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Returns a collection with all values.

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Returns a collection with all keys.

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: If the Key already exists then its Value is updated.

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: If a Key already exists, then its Value is updated

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Removes the item with the specified Key.

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Removes the items with the specified Keys.

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Removes the items with the Keys of the Dictionary

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Remove all items from the dictionary.

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Gets the Value for the given Key.

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Check if there is an item with the given Key.

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Remove all items from the dictionary. All previous items in the dictionary are removed. If the string has not a valid format no items are added.

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Get a string representation in json format for the dictionary.

Item.name: ChangesInterval
Item.description: Minimum time in seconds to generate new tracking information

Property.Name: Description
Property.Value: Minimum time in seconds to generate new tracking information

Item.name: Distance
Item.description: Minimum distance in meters to generate new tracking information

Property.Name: Description
Property.Value: Minimum distance in meters to generate new tracking information

Item.name: Action
Item.description: The name of the action from the parent object to be called where there is new tracking information available

Property.Name: Description
Property.Value: The name of the action from the parent object to be called where there is new tracking information available

Item.name: ActionTimeInterval
Item.description: The minimum interval in seconds between invocations to the action. Must be greater than changesInterval.

Property.Name: Description
Property.Value: The minimum interval in seconds between invocations to the action. Must be greater than changesInterval.

Item.name: Accuracy
Item.description: Precision to obtain the locations, in meters

Property.Name: Description
Property.Value: Precision to obtain the locations, in meters

Item.name: UseForegroundService
Item.description: Enables/disables the usage of Foreground service for tracking location.

Property.Name: Description
Property.Value: Enables/disables the usage of Foreground service for tracking location.

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: This property will return the internal version code of the app binary installed on the device

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Access Token for interacting with FB Graph API

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Whether WeChat is installed on the device and can be used by the app

LevelInfo.name: FacebookAccessToken
LevelInfo.description: Facebook Access Token required to interact with Facebook Graph API

Property.Name: Description
Property.Value: Facebook Access Token required to interact with Facebook Graph API

Part.Source: parm(in:&GxPendingEvents, in:&GxSyncroInfo, out:&EventResults);

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: The tracking authorization status that is current for the application.

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Requests permission to alert the user. Typically, you make this request if your app uses local or push notifications to alert the user to new information involving your app.

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Requests permission to use location services while the app is in the foreground.

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Requests permission to use location services whenever the app is running.

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Requests permission to access app-related data that can be used for tracking the user or the device.

Property.Name: IDEnumDefinedValues
Property.Value: 1, Purchasing, Purchasing; 2, Purchased, Purchased; 3, Failed, Failed; 4, Restored, Restored; 5, Deferred, Deferred

Property.Name: IDEnumDefinedValues
Property.Value: 1, GooglePlay, Google Play; 2, iTunes, iTunes; 3, AppGallery, Huawei AppGallery

Property.Name: IDEnumDefinedValues
Property.Value: 0, Invalid, Invalid; 1, Valid, Valid; 2, Expired, Expired; 3, Cancelled, Cancelled

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: If user device can make purchases

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Called when Purchase state changed (iOS only)

Property.Name: IDEnumDefinedValues
Property.Value: gx.media.metadata.artist, Artist, Artist; gx.media.metadata.album, Album, Album; gx.media.metadata.author, Author, Author; gx.media.metadata.writer, Writer, Writer; gx.media.metadata.composer, Composer, Composer; gx.media.metadata.compilation, Compilation, Compilation; gx.media.metadata.date, Date, Date; gx.media.metadata.year, Year, Year; gx.media.metadata.genre, Genre, Genre; gx.media.metadata.tracknumber, TrackNumber, TrackNumber; gx.media.metadata.numberoftracks, NumberOfTracks, NumberOfTracks; gx.media.metadata.discnumber, DiscNumber, DiscNumber; gx.media.metadata.albumartist, AlbumArtist, AlbumArtist

Property.Name: IDEnumDefinedValues
Property.Value: 0, None, None; 1, Buffered, Buffered; 2, Live, Live

Property.Name: IDEnumDefinedValues
Property.Value: 101, MPEG4, MPEG-4; 102, ThirdGenPP, 3GPP; 103, ThirdGenPP2, 3GPP2; 201, QuickTime, QuickTime (iOS); 202, M4V, iTunes (iOS)

Property.Name: IDEnumDefinedValues
Property.Value: 1, Rename, Rename; 2, Replace, Replace; 3, AskUser, Ask User

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Plays the given audio with the specified category

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Plays the given audio in background, keeps playing while the application is in background

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: The description is displayed in the lock screen

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Plays the given audio in background, keeps playing while the application is in background

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Stops the audio playing in all categories

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Stops the audio in the given category (if specified)

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Returns whether there is audio playing in any category

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Returns whether the audio is playing in the given category

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Returns the state of the current audio queue (including the position in the queue and inside the current playing item, if any).

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Sets the current audio queue. Stops current background playback, if any.

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Starts or resumes playback of the current audio queue.

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Pauses playback of the current audio queue.

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Sets the current item in the media queue, given its media id.

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Sets the current item in the media queue, given its index.

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Allows configuring the audio player UI settings

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Fires whenever the current media item or the state of the playback changes.

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Fires whenever a media item is "finished" (either because playback completes or for another reason, such as the user skipping to another item or stopping playback).

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Fires whenever a custom action (as defined in the settings) is launched by the user.

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: True if there is an active recording session, False otherwise

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Starts a recording session. Returns True if the operation was successful, False otherwise

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Stops the recording session and returns the URL of the recorder file.

Item.name: ContentType
Item.description: Content type for the media (such as "audio/mpeg")

Property.Name: Description
Property.Value: Content type for the media (such as "audio/mpeg")

Item.name: Key
Item.description: Property key. Usage of the values from MediaMetadataKey is preferred.

Property.Name: Description
Property.Value: Property key. Usage of the values from MediaMetadataKey is preferred.

Item.name: MediaId
Item.description: Id of the current item in the media queue

Property.Name: Description
Property.Value: Id of the current item in the media queue

Item.name: TrackPosition
Item.description: Number of milliseconds elapsed since the start of the media item

Property.Name: Description
Property.Value: Number of milliseconds elapsed since the start of the media item

Property.Name: IDEnumDefinedValues
Property.Value: 0, Success, Success; 1, AppNotOffline, Application is not Offline; 2, IncorrectPath, Incorrect path / Backup file not found; 3, DatabaseStructure, Database structure does not match; 9, InternalError, Internal error

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Path Uri of the backup file

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Call this method to execute the backup of the appplication offline database.

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Path Uri of the backup file

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Call this method to execute the restore of the appplication offline database from previous backup.

Property.Name: IDEnumDefinedValues
Property.Value: 0, ImageAndNumber, Image & number; 1, ImageOnly, Image only; 2, Automatic, Automatic

Property.Name: IDEnumDefinedValues
Property.Value: unrecognized, Unrecognized, Unrecognized; ambiguous, Ambiguous, Ambiguous; amex, Amex, Amex; JCB, JCB, JCB; visa, Visa, Visa; mastercard, Mastercard, Mastercard; discover, Discover, Discover; maestro, Maestro, Maestro; diners, DinersClub, Diners Club

Property.Name: IDEnumDefinedValues
Property.Value: 1, Queued, Queued; 2, Downloading, Downloading; 3, Downloaded, Downloaded; 4, Paused, Paused; 5, Canceled, Canceled

Property.Name: IDEnumDefinedValues
Property.Value: -1, None, None; 0, Success, Success; 1, Failure, Failure

Property.Name: IDEnumDefinedValues
Property.Value: AirplaneMode, AirplaneMode, Airplane Mode; Bluetooth, Bluetooth, Bluetooth; Display, Display, Display; Location, Location, Location; Media, Media, Media; Network, Network, Network; Notifications, Notifications, Notifications; Sound, Sound, Sound; Wifi, Wifi, Wifi

Property.Name: IDEnumDefinedValues
Property.Value: General, General, General; Application, Application, Application

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Call this action to execute the standard batch login against the OAuth server.

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Call this action to execute the standard batch login against the OAuth server.

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Call this action to execute the batch login against the OAuth server for a External login type.

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Call this action to execute the batch login against the OAuth server for a External login type.

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Call this action to execute the standard logout against the OAuth server.

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Returns to the main object of the application, clearing the current call stack.

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Returns to the object specified in the parameter. If it is present more than once in the call stack, it will return to the most recent instance.

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Call this action to execute the standard save in the edit form in the device.

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Call this action to execute the standard cancel in the edit form in the device.

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Returns to the object specified in the parameter, like ReturnTo method, but with the behavior of Cancel method.

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Call this action to execute the standard delete in the edit form in the device.

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Takes an application screenshot for further use like sharing, save in library, etc.

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Adds a contact to the device's Address Book

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Returns a collection of all the contacts in the device's Address Book

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Pick contact from the device's Address Book

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Pick a collection of contacts from the device's Address Book

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Get or set the Brightness of the device Screen

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Allows scanning a barcode from an image

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: A collection of the barcode types to detect

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Allows scanning a barcode from an image

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: The new URL for the application.

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: If the property Dynamic Services URL is set to True, changes the URL at runtime.

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Determines whether the device supports ranging. If False, all attempts to range beacons will fail.

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Determines whether the device supports beacon proximity alerts. If False, all attempts to set proximity alerts will fail.

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Determines whether the user has location services enabled. If False, and you proceed to call other Location API, user will be prompted with the warning or fail depending on the current authorization status.

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: The beacon proximity alert to start monitoring.

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Start monitoring the specified beacon region.

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: The beacon proximity alerts to start monitoring.

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Start monitoring the specified beacon regions.

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Retrieve a collection for the beacon regions that are currently being monitored.

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: The beacon proximity alert region's identifier to stop monitoring.

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Removes the beacon region being monitored.

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Removes all the beacon regions being monitored.

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: The beacon region's identifier to retrieve state.

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Retrieve the cached state of the specified region.

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: The region object that defines the identifying information for the targeted beacons.

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Starts the delivery of notifications for beacons in the specified region.

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Retrieve a collection for the beacon regions that are currently providing ranging.

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Stops the delivery of notifications for the specified beacon region.

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: The beacon region's identifier to retrieve becons in range. Empty means all regions.

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Retrieve a collection for the beacons (sorted by proximity) currently in range for the given region.

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Advertises the current device as a beacon.

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Stops advertising the current device as a beacon.

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: An object containing information about the region that was entered.

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Invoked when the user enters a monitored beacon region.

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: An object containing information about the beacon region that was exited.

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Invoked when the user exits a monitored beacon region.

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: The region object containing the parameters that were used to locate the beacons.

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: The beacons currently in range, sorted by proximity. If beacons is empty, it may be assumed no beacons that match the specified region are nearby. Similarly if a specific beacon no longer appears in beacons, it may be assumed the beacon is no longer received by the device.

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Invoked when a new set of beacons' states are available in the specified region.

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Opens the give URL in the InApp Browser

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Triggered before navigating to the given URL, set the &handled parameter to True to avoid navigation

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Triggered after the InApp Browser is closed, the &url parameter contains the last active web page´s URL

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Returns the name of the biometrics authentication method available on the current device

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Indicates the minimum time (in seconds) before asking the user to locally authenticate again after a successful authentication

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Specifies the policy the developer wants to use

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Returns True if the API can be used in the current device, False otherwise

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: If set to Biometrics, then only biometrics sensors will be used. If set to Any and biometrics is not available or is disabled, then the password will be used.

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Used to present the end user with a title when they are prompted for the local authorization. It is used only in Android.

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Used to present the end user with a message when they are prompted for the local authorization

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Performs the authentication step, using the method that corresponds for the current device.

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: The runtime state of the application.

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Triggered when the application's state changes

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Determines if 3D objects models can be displayed in Augmented Reality.

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: The 3D object model file to preview.

Property.Name: ExoItemDesc
Property.Value: Previews the given 3D object model in Augmented Reality.

Item.name: UUID
Item.description: The proximity ID of the beacon

Property.Name: Description
Property.Value: The proximity ID of the beacon

Item.name: NotifyOnEntry
Item.description: Alert will be executed when the user enters the region.

Property.Name: Description
Property.Value: Alert will be executed when the user enters the region.

Item.name: NotifyOnExit
Item.description: Alert will be executed when the user exits the region.

Property.Name: Description
Property.Value: Alert will be executed when the user exits the region.

Item.name: BeaconMatch
Item.description: Beacons in region match criteria (GroupId and Id are optional)

Property.Name: Description
Property.Value: Beacons in region match criteria (GroupId and Id are optional)

Item.name: Proximity
Item.description: Proximity of the beacon from the device. The value in this property gives a general sense of the relative distance to the beacon.

Property.Name: Description
Property.Value: Proximity of the beacon from the device. The value in this property gives a general sense of the relative distance to the beacon.

Item.name: Distance
Item.description: The estimated proximity value, measured in meters from the beacon. This value is heavily subject to variations in an RF environment. A negative accuracy value indicates the proximity is unknown.

Property.Name: Description
Property.Value: The estimated proximity value, measured in meters from the beacon. This value is heavily subject to variations in an RF environment. A negative accuracy value indicates the proximity is unknown.

Item.name: Signal
Item.description: Received signal strength in decibels of the specified beacon. This value is an average of the RSSI samples collected since this beacon was last reported.

Property.Name: Description
Property.Value: Received signal strength in decibels of the specified beacon. This value is an average of the RSSI samples collected since this beacon was last reported.

Item.name: NorthEast
Item.description: The point located at the north-most, east-most of the region

Property.Name: Description
Property.Value: The point located at the north-most, east-most of the region

Item.name: SouthWest
Item.description: The point located at the south-most, west-most of the region

Property.Name: Description
Property.Value: The point located at the south-most, west-most of the region

Property.Name: IDEnumDefinedValues
Property.Value: https://oauth2.googleapis.com/token, Google, Refresh access token URL for Google; https://login.microsoftonline.com/common/oauth2/v2.0/token, Microsoft_common, Refresh access token URL for MS with tenant common; https://login.microsoftonline.com/organizations/oauth2/v2.0/token, Microsoft_organizations, Refresh access token URL for MS with tenant organizations; https://login.microsoftonline.com/consumers/oauth2/v2.0/token, Microsoft_consumers, Refresh access token URL for MS with tenant consumers

Part.Source: parm(in:&OAuthAuthorizationConfig, in:&RefreshToken, out:&OAuthAccessToken, out:&DateTimeTokenExpire, out:&OutMessages, out:&Success);

Property.Name: IDEnumDefinedValues
Property.Value: hiragana, Hiragana, Hiragana; full width katakana, FullWidthKatakana, FullWidthKatakana; full width alphanumeric, FullWidthAlphanumeric, FullWidthAlphanumeric; half width katakana, HalfWidthKatakana, HalfWidthKatakana; half width alphanumeric, HalfWidthAlphanumeric, HalfWidthAlphanumeric; disabled, Disabled, Disabled; inactive, Inactive, Inactive

Property.Name: IDEnumDefinedValues
Property.Value: US-ASCII, ASCII, ASCII; Big5, Big5, Big5; Big5-HKSCS, Big5_HKSCS, Big5-HKSCS; EUC-JP, EUC_JP, EUC-JP; EUC-KR, EUC_KR, EUC-KR; GB18030, GB18030, GB18030; GB2312, GB2312, GB2312; GBK, GBK, GBK; IBM850, IBM850, IBM850; ISO-2022-JP, ISO_2022_JP, ISO-2022-JP; ISO-8859-1, ISO_8859_1, ISO-8859-1; ISO-8859-10, ISO_8859_10, ISO-8859-10; ISO-8859-13, ISO_8859_13, ISO-8859-13; ISO-8859-15, ISO_8859_15, ISO-8859-15; ISO-8859-16, ISO_8859_16, ISO-8859-16; ISO-8859-2, ISO_8859_2, ISO-8859-2; ISO-8859-3, ISO_8859_3, ISO-8859-3; ISO-8859-4, ISO_8859_4, ISO-8859-4; ISO-8859-5, ISO_8859_5, ISO-8859-5; ISO-8859-6, ISO_8859_6, ISO-8859-6; ISO-8859-7, ISO_8859_7, ISO-8859-7; ISO-8859-8, ISO_8859_8, ISO-8859-8; ISO-8859-9, ISO_8859_9, ISO-8859-9; KOI8-R, KOI8_R, KOI8-R; KOI8-U, KOI8_U, KOI8-U; KS_C_5601-1987, KS_C_5601_1987, KS_C_5601-1987; Shift_JIS, Shift_JIS, Shift_JIS; TIS-620, TIS_620, TIS-620; UTF-32, UTF_32, UTF-32; UTF-32 BOM, UTF_32_BOM, UTF-32 BOM; UTF-32BE BOM, UTF_32BE_BOM, UTF-32BE BOM; UTF-32LE BOM, UTF_32LE_BOM, UTF-32LE BOM; UTF-8, UTF_8, UTF-8; UTF-8 BOM, UTF_8_BOM, UTF-8 BOM; Windows-1250, Windows_1250, Windows-1250; Windows-1251, Windows_1251, Windows-1251; Windows-1252, Windows_1252, Windows-1252; Windows-1253, Windows_1253, Windows-1253; Windows-1254, Windows_1254, Windows-1254; Windows-1255, Windows_1255, Windows-1255; Windows-1256, Windows_1256, Windows-1256; Windows-1257, Windows_1257, Windows-1257; Windows-1258, Windows_1258, Windows-1258; Windows-31J, Windows_31J, Windows-31J; Windows-874, Windows_874, Windows-874; UTF-16BE BOM, UTF_16BE_BOM, UTF-16BE BOM; UTF-16LE BOM, UTF_16LE_BOM, UTF-16LE BOM

Property.Name: IDEnumDefinedValues
Property.Value: gx_default, Default, Default; gx_curl_up, CurlUp, Curl Up (iOS Only); gx_curl_down, CurlDown, Curl Down (iOS Only); gx_flip_from_left, FlipFromLeft, Flip From Left (iOS only); gx_flip_from_right, FlipFromRight, Flip From Right (iOS only); gx_slide_down, SlideDown, Slide Down; gx_slide_up, SlideUp, Slide Up; gx_slide_left, SlideLeft, Slide Left; gx_slide_right, SlideRight, Slide Right; gx_push_down, PushDown, Push Down; gx_push_up, PushUp, Push Up; gx_push_left, PushLeft, Push Left; gx_push_right, PushRight, Push Right; gx_fade, Fade, Fade; gx_none, None, None

Property.Name: IDEnumDefinedValues

Property.Name: IDEnumDefinedValues
Property.Value: INS, Insert, Insert; UPD, Update, Update; DLT, Delete, Delete; DSP, Display, Display

Property.Name: IDEnumDefinedValues
Property.Value: 0, NotDetermined, Not Determined; 1, Restricted, Restricted; 2, Denied, Denied; 3, Authorized, Authorized; 4, AuthorizedWhenInUse, Authorized When In Use

Property.Name: IDEnumDefinedValues
Property.Value: 0, Warning, Warning; 1, Error, Error; 2, Info, Info; 3, Debug, Debug

Property.Name: IDEnumDefinedValues
Property.Value: Small, Small, Small; Medium, Medium, Medium; Large, Large, Large

Property.Name: IDEnumDefinedValues
Property.Value: 1, OnNotificationArrive, On Notification Arrive; 0, OnLauchByUser, On Lauch By User

Property.Name: IDEnumDefinedValues
Property.Value: High, High, High; Normal, Normal, Normal

Property.Name: IDEnumDefinedValues
Property.Value: 0, iOS, iOS; 1, Android, Android; 2, Blackberry, Blackberry; 3, Windows, Windows

Property.Name: IDEnumDefinedValues
Property.Value: 3, Low, Low; 5, Medium, Medium; 7, High, High

Property.Name: IDEnumDefinedValues
Property.Value: 1, Background, Background; 2, Mix, Mix; 3, Solo, Solo

Property.Name: IDEnumDefinedValues
Property.Value: 0, None, None; 1, Stopped, Stopped; 2, Paused, Paused; 3, Playing, Playing; 4, Error, Error; 5, Transitional, Transitional

Property.Name: IDEnumDefinedValues
Property.Value: 0, None, None; 1, WiFi, WiFi; 2, WAN, WAN; 3, Roaming, Roaming

Property.Name: IDEnumDefinedValues
Property.Value: 1, INS, INS; 2, UPD, UPD; 3, DLT, DLT

Property.Name: IDEnumDefinedValues
Property.Value: 1, Pending, Pending; 2, ProcessingServer, Processing Server; 3, ConfirmedServer, Confirmed Server; 4, RejectedServer, Rejected Server; 5, CanceledUser, Canceled User; 6, RejectedFK, Rejected FK; 7, RejectedInvalidBC, Rejected Invalid BC

Property.Name: IDEnumDefinedValues
Property.Value: 0, Active, Active; 1, Inactive, Inactive; 2, Background, Background; 3, NotRunning, Not Running

Property.Name: IDEnumDefinedValues
Property.Value: 0, OK, OK; 1, SyncNotNeeded, Synchronization Not Needed; 2, AppNotOffline, Application Is Not Offline; 3, HasPendingEvents, Has Pending Events; 8, AlreadyRunning, Already Running; 51, ServerError1, Server Error 1; 52, ServerError2, Server Error 2; 53, ServerError3, Server Error 3; 99, UnknownError, Unknown Error

Property.Name: IDEnumDefinedValues
Property.Value: 0, Unknown, Unknown; 1, Inside, Inside; 2, Outside, Outside

Property.Name: IDEnumDefinedValues
Property.Value: 0, Unknown, Unknown; 1, Inmediate, Inmediate; 2, Near, Near; 3, Far, Far

Property.Name: IDEnumDefinedValues
Property.Value: 0, Unknown, Unknown; 1, PlaybackCompleted, Playback Completed; 2, Stopped, Stopped; 3, Skipped, Skipped; 4, QueueReplaced, Queue Replaced

Property.Name: IDEnumDefinedValues
Property.Value: GET, Get, Get; POST, Post, Post; PUT, Put, Put; DELETE, Delete, Delete; OPTIONS, Options, Options; HEAD, Head, Head; TRACE, Trace, Trace; CONNECT, Connect, Connect; PATCH, Patch, Patch

Property.Name: IDEnumDefinedValues
Property.Value: 0, Basic, Basic; 1, Digest, Digest; 2, NTLM, NTLM; 3, Kerberos, Kerberos; 4, OAuth, OAuth

Property.Name: IDEnumDefinedValues
Property.Value: content, Content, Content; left, Left, Left; right, Right, Right; top, Top, Top; bottom, Bottom, Bottom; blank, Blank, Blank

Property.Name: IDEnumDefinedValues
Property.Value: UPC-E, UPC_E, UPC-E Code; Code39, Code39, Code 39 Code; Code39Mod43, Code39Mod43, Code 39 mod 43 Code; EAN-13, EAN_13, EAN-13 Code; EAN-8, EAN_8, EAN-8 Code; Code93, Code93, Code 93 Code; Code128, Code128, Code 128 Code; Interleaved2of5, Interleaved2of5, Interleaved 2 of 5 Code; ITF-14, ITF_14, ITF-14 Code; PDF417, PDF417, PDF417 Code; QR, QR, QR Code; Aztec, Aztec, Aztec Code; DataMatrix, DataMatrix, Data Matrix Code

Property.Name: IDEnumDefinedValues

Property.Name: IDEnumDefinedValues
Property.Value: nowrap, NoWrap, No Wrap; wrap, Wrap, Wrap; wrap-reverse, WrapReverse, Wrap Reverse

Property.Name: IDEnumDefinedValues
Property.Value: flex-start, FlexStart, Flex Start; flex-end, FlexEnd, Flex End; center, Center, Center; space-between, SpaceBetween, Space Between; space-around, SpaceAround, Space Around

Property.Value: stretch, Stretch, Stretch; flex-start, FlexStart, FlexStart; flex-end, FlexEnd, Flex End; center, Center, Center; baseline, Baseline, Baseline

Property.Name: IDEnumDefinedValues
Property.Value: stretch, Stretch, Stretch; flex-start, FlexStart, Flex Start; flex-end, FlexEnd, Flex End; center, Center, Center; space-between, SpaceBetween, Space Between; space-around, SpaceAround, Space Around

Property.Name: IDEnumDefinedValues
Property.Value: =, Equal, Equal; >, Greater, Greater; >=, GreaterOrEqual, Greater Or Equal; <, Less, Less; <=, LessOrEqual, Less Or Equal; <>, NotEqual, Not Equal; like, Like, Like

Property.Name: IDEnumDefinedValues
Property.Value: 0, No, No; 1, Left, Left; 2, Right, Right

Property.Name: IDEnumDefinedValues
Property.Value: top, Top, Top; middle, Middle, Middle; bottom, Bottom, Bottom

Property.Name: IDEnumDefinedValues
Property.Value: left, Left, Left; center, Center, Center; right, Right, Right

Property.Name: IDEnumDefinedValues
Property.Value: AppleMusic, AppleMusic, Apple Music; Bluetooth, Bluetooth, Bluetooth; Calendar, Calendar, Calendar; Camera, Camera, Camera; Contacts, Contacts, Contacts; FaceId, FaceId, Face Id; HealthShare, HealthShare, Health Share; HelathUpdate, HelathUpdate, Helath Update; HomeKit, HomeKit, Home Kit; LocalNetwork, LocalNetwork, Local Network; LocationAlways, LocationAlways, Location Always; LocationBackground, LocationBackground, Location Background; LocationCoarse, LocationCoarse, Location Coarse; LocationFine, LocationFine, Location Fine; LocationTemporary, LocationTemporary, Location Temporary; LocationWhenInUse, LocationWhenInUse, Location When In Use; Microphone, Microphone, Microphone; Motion, Motion, Motion; NFC, NFC, NFC; Notifications, Notifications, Notifications; Reminders, Reminders, Reminders; Siri, Siri, Siri; SpeechRecognition, SpeechRecognition, Speech Recognition; Storage, Storage, Storage; UserTracking, UserTracking, User Tracking

Property.Name: ModuleDescription
Property.Value: GeneXus Core Module is a basic set of interfaces and implementations of data structures and algorithms to solve common programming use cases.

Property.Name: IDEnumDefinedValues
Property.Value: SI, Si, Si; NO, No, No
